results.title: Jake Paul’s reported $10 million loss resurfaces as Logan Paul’s biggest YouTube controversy returns to the spotlight
results.description: A resurfaced interview shared by @CultureHOF shows Jake Paul saying Logan Paul’s 2017 Japan controversy hurt his own career. Jake claimed he lost brand partnerships, a reported $10 million Target deal and YouTube revenue despite not being involved. The clip has sparked fresh debate, with some supporting Jake’s view while others believe the consequences were unavoidable because of the Paul family name.

results.title: Cong to observe 21 July at Shahid Minar
results.description: Bengal Congress to mark July 21 Martyr’s Day at Kolkata’s Shahid Minar, seeking reopening of 1993 police firing case that killed 13 workers; fresh probe sought.

results.title: Raj to mark int’l MSME Day for first time today
results.description: Rajasthan marks International MSME Day June 27; CM Bhajanlal Sharma launches Industrial Development Policy, RAMP portal, ODOP book; Rs 13 crore aid, RIICO land letters.

results.title: After Harry Kane 'Curse', 'Witch Doctor' Predicts Portugal As World Cup Winner
results.description: Nana Kwaku Bonsam previously grabbed headlines in 2014 for claiming he was behind Cristiano Ronaldo's injury ahead of Portugal's clash with Ghana.

results.title: HDFC Bank review finds no basis for concerns flagged in Atanu Chakraborty’s resignation
results.description: According to the statement included in the bank’s filing, “The legal review was conducted over a three-month period and involved the review of thousands of documents and interviews of the Independent Directors and several members of senior management.”

results.title: Middlemen offer discounted Iranian oil to Indian refiners after US waiver
results.description: National Iranian Oil Company and traders have approached Indian refiners with discounted crude following Washington's temporary sanctions waiver, though payment mechanisms remain unclear
